title: Crafters Optimisations + QOL
description: All of the optimisation mods I found on here + many QOL mods to improve the overall experience
body:
This modpack contains to key categories of mods: Performance optimisations and quality of life (QOL). 

This is not a typical modpack: You can use it to play on most online vanilla servers. It simply improves the client. It contains a lot of mods that I find useful for playing on public minecraft servers. But caution: some servers might deny using a minimap, so be aware of that!

CAUTION: 4GB RAM is mandatory to run!
Instance > Settings > Java and memory > Custom memory allocation => 4096

The modpack contains mods for:
- Litematica: To work with schematics
- Iris: for Shaders
- Performance mods
- ViaFrabricPlus: To be able to join on servers on lower versions
- Simple Voice Chat
- REI: The mod you know, where you can see every crafting recipe in the inventory
- Distant Horizons (powerhungry but an insane quality improvement)

and many, many more.....
